title: Public nutrition source acquisition
summary: 공공 영양 source를 versioned raw snapshot과 manifest로 취득하고 schema, pagination, license, secret redaction을 fail-closed 검증해 다음 slice용 approved/pinned input을 만든다.
goal: 사용자에게 노출되는 영양 계산과 catalog가 출처, 버전, 이용조건, checksum이 확인된 공공 데이터만 소비하도록 operator batch acquisition과 approval handoff 경계를 잠근다.

owners.claude: replaced for this nutrition slice by explicit user approval; the global stage-owner SOP is unchanged
owners.codex: this role-separated session owns Stage 1 authoring only; separate Codex sessions own Stage 1.5 review/repair-final, Stage 2 implementation, and Stage 3 review, and no authoring session may self-approve

out_of_scope: Product code, UI, routes, client fetch, Playwright, and design authority
Database migration or production write into nutrition and conversion tables
Ingredient nutrition profile creation or approval
Measurement conversion profile assignment and the 2.5g per 15mL approval threshold
Recipe nutrition calculation, snapshots, and display
Prepared food catalog and planner nutrition aggregation
User-request runtime provider calls, cron ingestion, and automatic production promotion
RDA measurement source table, text, layout, image, or full dataset republication
RDA 15143598 10.0 KOGL4 OpenAPI as a default normalization source
notes: Stage 1 docs are authored on docs/public-nutrition-source-acquisition from origin/master contract merge 046eb7fd. Roadmap status is docs while workflow lifecycle remains planned because workflow-status has no docs enum. Approval remains not_started until a separate Codex Stage 1.5 reviewer and repair/final owner close the docs gate. The authoring session does not self-approve, mark Ready, merge, or implement product/runtime files.
